failure_reason: Cited blocks p015_c0005 ('Improve bus lane signs and install terra-cotta red bus lane markings to enhance compliance') and p015_c0006 ('Maintain existing 24-hour bus lane operations') do not state the connection to 'project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study' or 'corridor_archer-ave-busway'. Neither block mentions 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study,' 'Archer Avenue,' or any corridor name. The connection relies on uncited slide headings (p015_c0001 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study', p015_c0002 'Archer Avenue Improved Bus Lanes', p015_c0003 'Existing Lanes: 150 th to 160 th Streets'). Co-occurrence on the same slide is not a relation per review rules.

Cited blocks p016_c0003 ('West Extension: Sutphin Boulevard to 150 th Street') and p016_c0005 ('Benefits predominant direction of bus travel May require some curb parking/delivery restrictions') do not state the connection. p016_c0003 mentions street names (Sutphin Boulevard, 150th Street) but does not name 'Archer Avenue' or 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study.' The connections to project and corridor rely on uncited slide headings (p016_c0001 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study', p016_c0002 'Archer Av Eastbound Bus Lanes').

The connections rely on uncited slide headings (p017_c0001 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study', p017_c0002 'Archer Av Eastbound Bus Lanes').

Cited block p023_c0003 ('Benefits 600 to 750 buses per direction daily') does not state the connection to 'corridor_jamaica-ave-busway.' The block contains a metric value but does not mention 'Jamaica Avenue' or any corridor identifier. The connection relies on the uncited slide heading p023_c0002 ('Jamaica Avenue Bus Lanes').

Cited block p007_c0003 raw text ('Community Advisory Committee meetings in Sept 2009 and April 2011') does not explicitly state the connection to project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study. The page-header block p007_c0001 ('Jamaica Bus Improvement Study') establishes slide-level context but was not cited as evidence. Per policy, co-occurrence in a document/slide is not a relation — the cited block text itself must state the connection.

Same block p007_c0003 as decision 2. Raw text does not state connection to Jamaica Bus Improvement Study. The uncited page-header block p007_c0001 provides the project context but the cited block itself does not.

Cited block p007_c0004 raw text ('Public Open House in May 2011') does not mention Jamaica Bus Improvement Study or any project. Connection relies entirely on uncited page-header block p007_c0001 on the same slide.

The uncited page-header p008_c0001 provides project context but the cited blocks themselves do not state the connection.
